new_classes.definition_en: Non-sparkling (still) other fermented beverage falling under CN subheading 2206 00 39, including the products described in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph (1)–(10), other than piquette (2206 00 10) and sparkling fermented beverages (2206 00 31).

coverage_explanation: The legal note for subheadings 2206 00 31–89 states that the "Other" group includes products (1)–(10) enumerated in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph. The key discriminating criterion captured here is: (a) the product is a fermented beverage under heading 2206 (subClassOf FermentedBeverage2206), and (b) it is non-sparkling / still (complement of SparklingWineQuality and CarbonatedQuality), thus distinguishing it from 2206 00 31 (sparkling) and 2206 00 10 (piquette, excluded by not being in that subclass). The specific enumeration of HS EN product types (1)–(10) — which covers items such as fermented beverages from grain, fruit, honey, rice, etc. — cannot be individually modelled without access to the full HS Explanatory Note text, so those sub-distinctions are not captured. Coverage is therefore partial.
